definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
example: She gave an eloquent speech at the event.
The benevolent old man donated generously to charity.

definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy way.
example: Finding the lost ring was pure serendipity.

definition: Lasting for a very short time.
example: The beauty of the sunset was ephemeral.
He sat quietly to cogitate on his next move.
Her explanation was lucid and easy to follow.
He was a gregarious person who loved social gatherings.

definition: Representing the most perfect example of a quality or class.

example: The athlete reached the zenith of his career.
The protestors were vociferous in their demands.
